name: Flounder Au Gratin
recipeIngredient: 4 green onions, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
1 (16 oz.) package frozen flounder, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a small saucepan over low heat.
2. Add onions and celery; sauté until tender. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper; cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually add milk; stir well. Cook over medium heat until thickened and bubbly, stirring constantly.
4. Add shredded Swiss cheese; reduce heat and cook until the cheese melts, stirring constantly. Set aside.
5. Arrange fillets in a single layer in a 10 x 6 x 2 inch baking dish coated with cooking spray.
6. Pour cheese mixture evenly over fillets.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes, or until fillets flake easily when tested with a fork.
8. Sprinkle with parsley.
